description.to: Deals 257*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient)) + 121.1% ATK M.DMG to 1 enemy 4 time(s), then loads a powerful arrow and deals 445*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient)) + 196.6% ATK M.DMG.

description.from: Deals ??? M.DMG to enemies in range and shackles them for 6 sec.
description.to: Deals 927*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient)) + 407.4% ATK Magic Damage to enemies within range and roots them for 3.5 sec.

description.from: Deals ??? M.DMG to enemies in a straight line and inflicts Blind for 6 sec.
description.to: Targets 1 enemy and deals 1093*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient)) + 479.3% ATK Magic Damage to enemies in a line, blinding them for 3.5 sec.

description.from: Each auto attack deals extra ??? M.DMG that ignores target's M.DEF.
description.to: On hit, deals 57*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient)) + 25% ATK additional Magic Damage to the target, and this skill gains an extra 1000 Magic Defense Penetration.

dark.from: Has a 25% chance of Blinding the enemy for 5 sec.
dark.to: On hit, has a 25% chance to blind the target for 3 sec.

light.from: Mana cost is increased by 1 orb but DMG is boosted by 100%.
light.to: Mana cost is increased by 1000, and damage dealt is increased by 100%.

dark.from: There is a 10% chance that **Skill 1** is fired upon an auto-attack.
dark.to: On Normal Attack, has a 10% chance to use the [Dark Barrage] skill.

description.from: [Shadow Wave] DMG is increased by 50% and Blind duration is increased by {0} sec.
description.to: [Shadow Wave] Increases DMG by 50% and the duration of Blind by {0} sec.

description.from: Each attack has a {0}% chance of dealing {1}% of ATK as M.DMG, and all skill cooldowns are reduced by 10%.
description.to: On hit, has a {0}% chance to deal Magic Damage equal to {1}% of Attack Power and reduce the cooldown of all skills by 10%.

description.from: Summons the soul of Tears of the Moon, Nerius, dealing ??? M.DMG to frontal enemies and inflicting them with [Curse of the Moon] for 10 sec. Targets inflicted with [Curse of the Moon] take 25% increased M.DMG and have their Heal Rate reduced by 25%. Afterward, increases own Crit DMG by 50%.
description.to:
Summons the soul of Tears of the Moon, Nerius, dealing 400% of ATK M.DMG to frontal enemies and inflicting [Curse of the Moon] for 10sec, and increases own Crit DMG by 70%.

[Curse of the Moon]: Increases M.DMG taken by 12% and reduces Heal Rate by 12%.

1.from: Increases DMG by 50% and changes the M.DMG Boost effect to 45%.

2.from: For the duration of Skill, Increases own ATK by 40%.
2.to: For the duration of Skill, increases own ATK by 40%.
